title: NYC Eats
description: An agentic restaurant concierge for the iconic biannual NYC Restaurant Week built, built for Fulton Ring startup

title: AI Builtout Atlas
description: A map of emerging physical AI infrastructure (data centers) and concomitant labor market dynamics

title: The Periphery Center
description: A living culture lab focused on building community through the creative exploration of technology, space and ritual as our cultural medium.

title: Keeping It Urban
description: A 150-person summit celebrating art, tech, culture that can only emerge from the density of people in NYC

title: Agent-Mon
description: A gamified, Pokemon-inspired experience of engaging with and learning about agents for children and geriatric; 2nd place winner of Anthropic x Betaworks Interfaces Hackathon

title: NYC AlgoMatcher
description: A civic tech platform for NYC residents to identify municipal algorithms trained on their personal data (received supervisory counsel from NYC OTI)

title: NYC Races
description: A local map of run clubs, marathons, Strava routes, and water stations, restrooms for NYC runners

title: Text Me Not
description: A silly app that analyses your Whatsapp transcripts and shares stats on your texting habits with your friend, lover, partner
